title: Niches Coaching B2B — arbitrage Coaching Premium x Agences Business Development
a0_intent_verbatim: creons l'ADR des Niches de l'industrie du Coaching (rejet medical/psy HIPAA/FDA, recentrage B2B Coaching+BizDev, PoC tri-axial Medvi assaini)
decision: Niche verrouillée = intersection Cabinets Coaching Premium x Agences Business Development. Pricing 1000$/mo x 100 = 1.2M ARR, marge >90% via MiniMax fixed plan + inference locale. PoC tri-axial (T1 People/Ops/IT, T2 Product/Growth/Sales, Duo Finance/Legal) mapping canon.
d4_correction: Deep Research avait melange les tags LDxx sur domaines Business (erreur de categorie axe Life-Wheel vs axe 8-domaines). Corrige au mapping ADR-CANON-001. Les 8 domaines vivent tous sous LD01.
d1_note: Chiffres Watchgang/Medvi = source Deep Research, NON verifies A'Space, traites comme narratif de cas. MiniMax 5.1Md/50$ = verifie canon (ADR-LLM-COST-COMPARE-001).
